test.create_query: CREATE TABLE test_limit_by_{cardinality} (a UInt32, b UInt32, v UInt64) ENGINE = MergeTree ORDER BY (a, b)
test.query: SELECT number % {cardinality} AS k, number AS v FROM numbers_mt(10000000) ORDER BY v LIMIT 10 BY k FORMAT NULL
SELECT number % {cardinality} AS k, number AS v FROM numbers_mt(10000000) ORDER BY k, v LIMIT 10 BY k FORMAT NULL
SELECT number % {cardinality} AS grp, number AS v FROM numbers_mt(10000000) ORDER BY v LIMIT 10 BY grp % 64 FORMAT NULL
SELECT number, concat(toString(number), '-', lowerUTF8(toString(number * 31)), '-', toString(number % 97)) AS bucket FROM numbers_mt(10000000) ORDER BY number LIMIT 10 BY bucket FORMAT NULL
SELECT if(number % 10 = 0, number % {cardinality}, 0) AS k, number AS v FROM numbers_mt(10000000) ORDER BY k, v LIMIT 10 BY k FORMAT NULL
SELECT toUInt8(number % {cardinality}) AS k, number AS v FROM numbers_mt(10000000) ORDER BY k, v LIMIT 10 BY k FORMAT NULL
SELECT toLowCardinality(toString(number % {cardinality})) AS k, number AS v FROM numbers_mt(10000000) ORDER BY k, v LIMIT 10 BY k FORMAT NULL
SELECT toString(number % {cardinality}) AS k1, toString(number % 97) AS k2, number AS v FROM numbers_mt(10000000) ORDER BY k1, k2, v LIMIT 10 BY k1, k2 FORMAT NULL
